name: kg-suite-canonicalize-action
description: GitHub Action that compares each Kinetic Gain Suite spec doc's canonical sha256 against a committed baseline (.kg-hashes.json) and fails the build when any doc drifted without a version bump. Silent-edit detector. Third cross-protocol Action — companion to kg-suite-spec-version-tracker-action and kg-suite-conformance-runner-action.
author: mizcausevic-dev
